fields.name: Innovation
fields.description: Resources related to developing new ideas, approaches and solutions that create meaningful value.

fields.name: Design Thinking
fields.description: Resources related to human-centered problem solving, ideation and iterative solution design.

fields.name: Entrepreneurship
fields.description: Resources related to identifying opportunities, creating ventures and delivering sustainable value.

fields.name: Product Strategy
fields.description: Resources related to product vision, planning, positioning and long-term product success.

fields.name: Business Model
fields.description: Resources related to designing, evaluating and improving business models and value propositions.

fields.name: Lean Startup
fields.description: Resources related to rapid experimentation, validated learning and iterative product development.

fields.name: Digital Innovation
fields.description: Resources related to leveraging digital technologies to create transformative products, services and experiences.

fields.name: Problem Solving
fields.description: Resources related to analytical thinking, structured problem solving and solution development.

fields.name: Emerging Technologies
fields.description: Resources related to evaluating and applying new and evolving technologies across industries.

fields.name: Value Creation
fields.description: Resources related to generating sustainable value for individuals, organizations and society through innovation.
